response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning with the primary stack. They have also worked on various projects involving AI agent development and have a good understanding of cloud platforms and containerization.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and JavaScript
Experience with full-stack development and AI agent infrastructure
Strong background in developing scalable and efficient applications
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Less experience with Kotlin/Java compared to other technologies
Some experience is in slightly different contexts or older projects

key_factors.factor: Less direct experience with specific tech stack (Nest.js, Vitest)
